Effective IEC strategies and other large-scale educational campaigns should be launched to encourage people to follow the dietary guidelines. Such efforts should be integrated with the existing national nutrition and health programs. nutrition 2 CURRENT DIET AND NUTRITION SCENARIO Health and nutrition are the most important contributory factors for human resource development in the country. India has been classified by the World Bank 1as a country with a lower middle income, with per capita GNP of US $ 996-3945 . It th ranks 160 in terms of human development among 209 countries.
